title: Entity Eat Mob Behavior
description: Allows the entity to eat a specified Mob.

eat_animation_time.title: Eat Animation Time
eat_animation_time.description:
Sets the time in seconds the eat animation should play for.

Sample values:
• frog: 0.3

eat_mob_sound.title: Eat Mob Sound
eat_mob_sound.description:
Sets the sound that should play when eating a mob.

Sample values:
• frog: tongue

loot_table.title: Loot Table
loot_table.description:
The loot table for loot to be dropped when eating a mob.

Sample values:
• frog: loot_tables/entities/frog.json

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• frog: 7

pull_in_force.title: Pull In Force
pull_in_force.description:
Sets the force which the mob-to-be-eaten is pulled towards the eating mob.

Sample values:
• frog: 0.75

reach_mob_distance.title: Reach Mob Distance
reach_mob_distance.description:
Sets the desired distance to be reached before eating the mob.

Sample values:
• frog: 1.75

run_speed.title: Run Speed
run_speed.description:
Sets the entity's speed when running toward the target.

Sample values:
• frog: 2
